Book Appointment
World-Class Oncology Expertise

Our Specialties & Care

Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy delivers compassionate, state-of-the-art cancer treatment across a diverse range of specialties, ensuring personalized protocols tailored to every patient's unique diagnosis.

Radiation Oncology

Precise, technologically advanced cancer treatment utilizing focused radiation beams with clinical excellence.

Key Highlights

  • IMRT/IGRT/SRS/SRT/RapidArc
  • External Beam Therapy
  • Brachytherapy
  • Stereotactic Radiosurgery
Learn More →

Medical Oncology

Advanced chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and targeted therapies for comprehensive and systemic cancer management.

Key Highlights

  • Chemotherapy
  • Immunotherapy
  • Targeted Drug Therapy
  • Hormonal Therapy Protocols
Learn More →

Surgical Oncology

Expert surgical interventions prioritizing tumor eradication while conserving organ function and health.

Key Highlights

  • Advanced Tumor Resections
  • Minimally Invasive Surgeries
  • Organ Preservation Surgery
  • Reconstructive Oncology
Learn More →

Hemato-Oncology

Specialized diagnostic and curative protocols for blood-related malignancies and lymphatic disorders.

Key Highlights

  • Leukemia Treatments
  • Lymphoma Management
  • Multiple Myeloma Care
  • Advanced Blood Disorders
Learn More →

Breast Oncology

Comprehensive breast care focusing on early detection, advanced targeted therapies, and cosmetic reconstruction.

Key Highlights

  • Breast-Conserving Surgeries
  • SBRT for Breast Cancers
  • Hormone & Targeted Therapies
  • Oncoplastic Reconstruction
Learn More →

Head & Neck Oncology

Multidisciplinary management of head and neck region cancers with extreme focus on speech and swallowing function.

Key Highlights

  • Oral & Throat Oncology
  • Thyroid Gland Cancers
  • Speech & Swallowing Rehab
  • Microvascular Reconstruction
Learn More →

Thoracic Oncology

Expert therapies and advanced surgical and radiation approaches for lung, esophageal, and chest cavity tumors.

Key Highlights

  • Lung Cancer Treatments
  • Esophageal Oncology
  • Mediastinal Tumors
  • Stereotactic Radiotherapy (SBRT)
Learn More →

Gastrointestinal Oncology

Dedicated treatment pathways for malignancies of the digestive tract, esophagus, liver, pancreas, and colon.

Key Highlights

  • Colorectal Cancer Care
  • Stomach & Esophageal Tumors
  • Pancreatic & Biliary Oncology
  • Hepatic (Liver) Cancer Protocols
Learn More →

Gynecologic Oncology

Specialized, compassionate care for female reproductive system cancers utilizing advanced surgical modalities.

Key Highlights

  • Cervical & Ovarian Cancers
  • Uterine & Endometrial Care
  • Fertility-Sparing Procedures
  • Advanced Pelvic Surgery
Learn More →

Uro-Oncology

Precision therapies and robotic surgeries for male reproductive tract and urinary system cancers.

Key Highlights

  • Prostate Cancer (SBRT / IMRT)
  • Kidney Cancer Management
  • Bladder Tumors & Surgery
  • Testicular Cancer Protocols
Learn More →

Ocular Oncology

Pioneering visual-preservation treatments for eye tumors, intraocular melanomas, and orbital cancers.

Key Highlights

  • Retinoblastoma Management
  • Uveal Melanoma Therapies
  • Plaque Brachytherapy Care
  • Vision-Preserving Surgeries
Learn More →

Pediatric Oncology

Gentle, dedicated cancer care for children, infants, and adolescents, strictly using pediatric-safe protocols.

Key Highlights

  • Childhood Leukemias Care
  • Pediatric Proton Therapy
  • Brain & Solid Tumors
  • Long-term Survivorship Support
Learn More →

Neuro-Oncology

State-of-the-art navigation surgeries and stereotactic radiosurgery for brain and spinal cord tumors.

Key Highlights

  • Primary Brain Tumors / Gliomas
  • Metastatic Spinal Lesions
  • Stereotactic Radiosurgery (SRS)
  • Image-Guided Neuro-Navigation
Learn More →

Need a Personalized Treatment Plan?

Consult with Dr. Vijay Anand Reddy and our multidisciplinary medical boards for customized diagnostics, state-of-the-art therapies, and world-class recovery protocols.

Book Consultation Now Call Support: +91-9676720002

Leading cancer care with over 34 years of experience in radiation oncology. Providing compassionate, evidence-based treatment and hope to thousands of patients through advanced technologies like Proton Therapy and Brachytherapy.

Years Experience
75K+
Patients Treated
100+
